user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Parnell Aerospace. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 16:35 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Parnell Aerospace escalation triage

There's been a change in our timeline for escalation triage. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
Date: 2024-02-23 14:59 EST
Subject: Re: Re: escalation triage Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Christopher Martinez <christopher.martinez@parnellaeros.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-26 11:43 EST
Subject: URGENT: escalation triage Issue at Parnell Aerospace

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about escalation triage. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: escalation triage Discussion - Parnell Aerospace
Date: 2024-01-03
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is escalation triage.

[00:08:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on partner engagement and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:10:00] Christopher Martinez (Parnell Aerospace): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:14:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:19:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): The timeline for resource allocation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about technical validation. Can we address those?

[00:24:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.
